hooks.prompt:
Before this context is compacted, update the active ticket with a session exit block.

Append these markers to the active ticket file (use the Edit or Write tool):

<!-- checkpoint: <current-phase: triage|spec|design|implement|test|verify> -->
<!-- exit-state: <one sentence: what you were doing, where you stopped, immediate next step> -->
<!-- key-files: <comma-separated file paths load-bearing for resuming this work> -->
<!-- open-questions: <unresolved questions for the next session, or 'none'> -->

Rules:
- Write to the ticket file directly — not to chat output
- Keep exit-state to one sentence
- If no ticket is active or work is complete, skip this entirely
- Do not include secrets or personal data
